name: Checkbox
description: Independent multi-select toggle (Figma 541:6305, component set 328:18039). The box is a fixed 18px radius-4 square regardless of size: white with a gray.40 border when unchecked, primary.50 with a light check when checked, and a gray.80 dash for the indeterminate partial selection shown on parent checkboxes. An optional label sits at a 6px gap; size only scales the label (md 14 — base, lg 16) and bold renders it SemiBold.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Visible label next to the box, sized by the size variant (md 14/lg 16); also names the checkbox.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Partial-selection look for parent checkboxes (Figma state=indeterminate); announced as mixed.

props.name: bold
props.description: SemiBold label for emphasized items (Figma bold).

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Fires with the next value when the checkbox is toggled.

limitations: indeterminate renders the dash via data-state; the DOM mixed property needs client code.

accessibility.focusManagement: Checkbox is a native input; focus follows the platform.
